texto: How does one measure bravery? I suppose one starts by looking at the difference between what you are naturally inclined to do, and what your sense of duty tells you you should do. Courage is what it costs you to cover the deficiency.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ian Gardiner que provoca enfrentar incertezas com ação. Ao questionar “How does one measure bravery? I suppose one starts by looking at the difference between what you …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre coragem, reflexao, measure, com foco em reflexao.
